readiness_description: All required and recommended gates pass. Suitable for a candidate internal first-results note.

gates.description: A preregistration plan is recorded in run metadata for any result labeled confirmatory.
The preregistration plan must have _locked: true for a confirmatory result.
gates.detail: At least one run has a locked preregistration plan.

gates.description: Each catalog must use a null model appropriate for its instrument.
gates.detail: All catalogs use appropriate null models.

gates.description: Multiple-testing correction is applied and is recorded in run metadata.
At least two independent catalogs are present in the comparison.
The comparison output must include an explicit replication verdict.
Known systematics and caveats must be documented in the comparison memo.
All required output artifacts (summary JSON, memo markdown, comparison JSON) must be present.
gates.detail: Summary JSON and comparison output appear complete.

gates.description: A cross-catalog comparison memo is present in the output directory.
Run memos must not make unsupported metaphysical claims.
gates.detail: No metaphysical language detected in interpretation.

gates.description: External scientific review has not yet been completed.
gates.detail: External review has not yet been initiated (expected — this is a status flag).

gates.description: IceCube HESE small-N limitation is acknowledged in any result using that catalog.
gates.detail: IceCube small-N limitation acknowledged in caveats.
